allow: Bash(py -c "import json; s=json.load\(open\('openapi.json'\)\); print\(f'OpenAPI {s[\\"openapi\\"]} - {s[\\"info\\"][\\"title\\"]} v{s[\\"info\\"][\\"version\\"]} - {len\(s[\\"paths\\"]\)} paths'\)")
Bash(curl -sS -i -X GET "https://rapidapi.com" --max-time 10 -o /dev/null -w "rapidapi.com base reachable: HTTP %{http_code} in %{time_total}s\\n")

Bash(curl -sS -i -X GET "https://freight-carbon-compliance.p.rapidapi.com/api/v1/emissions/modes" -H "X-RapidAPI-Host: freight-carbon-compliance.p.rapidapi.com" -H "X-RapidAPI-Key: invalid-test-key-deliberately" --max-time 10 -w "\\n--- Total: %{time_total}s, HTTP %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(py -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({'co2e_kg':d['co2e_kg'],'transport_type':d['transport_type'],'fuel_resolved':d['methodology_reference']['fuel_resolved'],'region_resolved':d['methodology_reference']['region_resolved'],'factor':d['methodology_reference']['factor_kg_co2e_per_tkm'],'version':d['methodology_reference']['extra_references']['version_resolved'],'chain_steps':[s['step'] for s in d['methodology_reference']['resolution_chain']]},indent=2\)\)")

Bash(py -c "import json; s=json.load\(open\('openapi.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); ex=s['paths']['/api/v1/emissions/calculate']['post']['requestBody']['content']['application/json'].get\('examples',{}\); print\('Calc request examples:', list\(ex.keys\(\)\)\); resp=s['paths']['/api/v1/emissions/calculate']['post']['responses']; print\('Calc response codes:', list\(resp.keys\(\)\)\); print\('200 examples:', list\(resp['200']['content']['application/json'].get\('examples',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")
